message:
fix: wire Export Widget to open Console Studio on all dashboards (#8631)

CardWrapper's "Export Widget" menu item calls
studioContext.openAddCardModal() which sets isAddCardModalOpen in
DashboardContext. But DashboardPage (used by CI/CD, Deploy, Security,
etc.) never read that context state — it used only local showAddCard.

Add a bridge useEffect in DashboardPage that syncs context state into
local state, so clicking Export Widget on any dashboard opens Console
Studio with the Widgets section and the card pre-selected.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
